properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 102/24

 M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATION FROM 06 AUG. 2024 IN NORWEGIAN SEA.
 TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES WITH A MAXIMUM LENGTH OF 6 NM, WITH A TOTAL WIDTH OF 1 NM. IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY:
  
 A..66-39N 004-44E
 B..67-00N 006-20E
 C. 66-24N 007-39E
 D. 66-01N 005-43E
  
 SHE IS RESTRICTED IN HER ABILITY TO MANUEVER.
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED OF 3 NM AHEAD, 3 NM FROM BOTH SIDES ABEAM AND 7 NM ASTERN.
  
 WITH TWO SUPPORT VESSELS, M/V THOR MAGNI AND M/V 7-WAVES IN ATTENDANCE.
 VHF WORKING CHANNELS ARE VHF CH 72 AND CH 16
  
 END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
